hero.title: Siberian Kittens
hero.subtitle: FIFe Certified - 1. DEKZV e.V.
hero.description: Small family cattery of traditional Siberian and Neva Masquerade cats.

topics.title: History and origins of the Siberian cat
topics.content: The Siberian cat comes from the cold regions of Russia and has adapted over centuries to harsh climates, developing a dense and water-repellent coat. It is a natural breed, shaped more by environment than by human intervention, with a balanced temperament and remarkable resilience.

topics.title: The Neva Masquerade variant and its features
topics.content: The Neva Masquerade is the colorpoint variant of the Siberian, recognizable by the contrast between a lighter body and darker extremities, often paired with deep blue eyes. It preserves the structure, temperament, and robustness of the classic Siberian, with an especially elegant appearance.

topics.title: Why choose a Siberian cat?
topics.content: It is an ideal choice for those seeking an affectionate but not invasive cat, intelligent and well suited to family life. It bonds strongly with people, lives well with children and other animals, and shows excellent adaptability to home environments.

topics.title: Is the Siberian cat hypoallergenic?
topics.content: There is no completely non-allergenic cat, but many Siberian cats produce lower levels of the Fel d1 protein compared to other breeds. For people with mild or moderate allergies, they can be better tolerated, though assessment always remains individual.

topics.title: Did you know the Siberian cat is also used in pet therapy?
topics.content: Thanks to its sociable temperament and sensitivity to human mood, the Siberian is involved in assisted programs in some contexts. Its presence can promote relaxation, motivation, and interaction, especially in educational or emotional support activities.

aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.intro: We are a small family cattery dedicated to Siberian and Neva Masquerade cats. We work with care, ethics and passion, selecting healthy lines and balanced temperaments.

sections.title: Who we are
sections.content:
Imperial Line was born from a family project: to raise a small number of cats, follow them every day, and give kittens a calm growth path in a home environment.

We believe in quality over quantity: each litter is planned with care, respecting the mother's timing and each kitten's wellbeing.

sections.title: Our goals
sections.content:
Our goal is to preserve the traditional Siberian type: strong structure, correct coat and a gentle, social temperament.

We select tested bloodlines and work to improve health, character balance and overall breed quality.

sections.title: Our mission
sections.content:
Our mission is to guide each family through a conscious path, from reservation to the kitten's first days at home.

We stay available even after placement with practical advice, ongoing support and updates.

sections.title: Our daily approach
sections.content:
Kittens grow up at home, in contact with real people, sounds and routines. This helps build confidence, trust and adaptation skills.

Before placement, we work on socialization, basic grooming and autonomy so each kitten is ready for the new family.

footer.tagline: Siberian & Neva Masquerade Cattery of Excellence

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how we process personal data submitted through the contact/booking form for information requests about our kittens. Data is not sold or shared with third parties for commercial purposes.

sections.title: 1. Data Controller
paragraphs: Controller: Anamaria Colniceanu
Address: 86830 Schwabmuenchen, Germany
Privacy email: Imperial-line-siberians@hotmail.com

sections.title: 2. Personal data processed
paragraphs: We process data voluntarily submitted by users in the form: full name, email, phone number (if provided), preferences, and information useful to handle the request.
Technical browsing data (e.g., IP address and technical logs) may also be processed as necessary for security and website operation.

sections.title: 3. Purposes and legal basis
paragraphs: Managing and responding to information requests about kittens, availability, and bookings.
Contacting users through the details they provide in order to follow up on their request.
Legal basis: pre-contractual measures at the request of the data subject (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR) and, where necessary, legitimate interests of the controller (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).

sections.title: 4. Processing methods and retention
paragraphs: Data is processed with electronic tools and appropriate security measures by authorized personnel.
Data is retained for the time needed to manage the request and related follow-up communications.
Indicative retention period: [E.G. 12/24 MONTHS FROM LAST CONTACT], unless a longer period is required by law or for legal protection.

sections.title: 5. Data recipients
paragraphs: Data is not sold or shared with third parties for commercial or marketing purposes.
Data may be processed only by technical providers necessary to deliver the service (e.g., hosting and email providers), appointed as processors where required.
If any provider is outside the EU, transfers are carried out in compliance with GDPR using appropriate safeguards (e.g., SCCs).

sections.title: 6. Data subject rights
paragraphs: Data subjects may exercise rights under Arts. 15-22 GDPR: access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, and portability (where applicable).
To exercise your rights, contact: Imperial-line-siberians@hotmail.com.
You may also lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.

sections.title: 7. Nature of data provision
paragraphs: Providing data marked as mandatory in the form is necessary to process the request.
Without mandatory data, we may be unable to provide a response.

sections.title: 8. Updates
paragraphs: This policy may be updated over time.
Any changes will be published on this page with the updated date.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: At present, this website does not use profiling, marketing, or analytics cookies and does not set non-essential cookies on user devices.

sections.title: 1. What cookies are
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on the user's device while browsing.
They may be technical, analytics, or profiling cookies, first-party or third-party.

sections.title: 2. Cookies used on this website
paragraphs: Currently, no profiling or marketing cookies are used.
Currently, no analytics cookies are used.
No third-party cookies are currently set through this website.

sections.title: 3. Legal basis
paragraphs: As no non-essential cookies are currently used, cookie banner consent is not required at this time.
If non-technical cookies are introduced in the future, a compliant consent mechanism will be implemented.

sections.title: 4. Duration and retention
paragraphs: As no cookies are currently used, no cookie duration table applies.
Any future updates will be reflected in this policy.

sections.title: 5. Preference management
paragraphs: Users can always manage or block cookies through browser settings.
As no non-essential cookies are currently used, there is no cookie preference panel on the site at this time.

sections.title: 6. Third-party services
paragraphs: At present, no third-party services are known to set cookies through this website.
If such services are added, this policy will be updated accordingly.

sections.title: 7. Contact
paragraphs: For privacy and cookie information contact: Imperial-line-siberians@hotmail.com.

maintenancePage.title: Website under maintenance
maintenancePage.message: We are performing a technical update. We will be back online as soon as possible.

adoptionPage.title: Adoption Conditions
adoptionPage.intro: To ensure wellbeing and serenity for our kittens and their new families, we follow clear and transparent rules throughout every stage of adoption.

sections.title: Delivery at 14 weeks of age
paragraphs: Kittens leave our home and join their new families only after reaching 14 weeks of age.
This period is essential for healthy and complete development near their mother and siblings.

sections.title: Health guarantee and genetic testing
paragraphs: All our adult cats are tested for the most common conditions: FIV, FeLV, PKD and HCM.
A copy of the test results is provided to new owners at handover.

sections.title: Original pedigree
paragraphs: Each kitten is placed with an original FIFe or WCF pedigree, protecting lineage and breed integrity.
We also provide a copy of both parents' pedigrees.

sections.title: Complete veterinary care
paragraphs: Kittens receive two deworming cycles and two vaccinations.
At delivery, a health booklet is provided to certify their good health condition.

sections.title: Updates and ongoing support
paragraphs: After reservation, we regularly share photos, videos and growth updates.
We remain available over time for guidance and support, to help wellbeing and adaptation in the new home.

sections.title: Pet kittens and neutering
paragraphs: Unless otherwise agreed, kittens are placed as pets.
Neutering is required around 6 to 8 months, or when indicated by your veterinarian, once the kitten reaches about 70 to 80 percent of expected adult weight.
We do not neuter kittens before delivery because we consider them too young for early surgery.

sections.title: Breeding rights
paragraphs: Placement with breeding rights is possible only after a specific agreement before contract signing.
We do not place kittens in isolation-cage breeding facilities or mixed-breed programs: we carefully select families and breeders.

sections.title: Kittens for abroad
paragraphs: For international placement, rabies vaccination, legal waiting periods and an international passport are required.
Additional costs for documents and vaccinations are covered by the buyer.

sections.title: Reservation, deposit and waiting list
paragraphs: A kitten is considered reserved only after receiving a 350 euro deposit. If you reserve more than one kitten, you only pay one deposit
In case of reconsideration, the deposit is generally non-refundable, except for justified exceptions communicated promptly.
A free waiting list is available for those who want an Imperial Line kitten but are not ready to reserve yet.

sections.title: Shipping and travel
paragraphs: Whenever possible, we prefer direct handover or pickup by the new family.
Air transport for abroad is possible, while courier shipment is not accepted.

sections.title: Our daily commitment
paragraphs: We raise kittens at home and gradually prepare them for domestic life and socialization.
Before handover, we make sure they are independent, healthy and confident in human contact.
points: Socialization with people and other cats.
Grooming training: brush, nail care, first bath.
Independent feeding with quality wet and dry food.
Regular updates with photos, videos and temperament notes.
Delivery of a kitten in excellent health condition.
Complimentary starter kit with food, toy and blanket.

sections.title: Relationship with new families
paragraphs: We maintain continuous and friendly contact with families even after placement.
We answer questions and provide support to ensure kittens have an ideal environment.

contactPage.title: Reservation
contactPage.subtitle: Pre-adoption form
contactPage.intro: Fill out this form to help us understand your needs and guide you toward the most suitable kitten.
contactPage.introLead: Fill in your details here to help us choose the perfect families with whom our kittens will spend the rest of their lives.
contactPage.introConditions: Before completing the form, please make sure you have read the basic conditions under which Imperial Line kittens will leave their home. If you have not done so yet, you can find them here.
contactPage.afterFormNote: Thank you for your interest and trust in our small Imperial Line cattery. Once you complete and submit the form above, we will contact you within 24 hours by email (or another contact method you provided). Afterwards, once your adoption request is accepted, we can proceed with signing the reservation contract for your desired kitten. If you have any other questions or need clarification, do not hesitate to contact us. We will be happy to meet you and answer all your questions. Thank you!

advicePage.intro: It is not just a cat; it is a royal member of your family. Here is how to guarantee a healthy, happy life worthy of its majesty.
advicePage.ctaDescription: We are available for pre- and post-adoption support. The health of our kittens is always our top priority.

tips.title: Arrival at Home
tips.description: The first days are crucial. Create a safe room with everything needed before exploring the rest of the house. The Siberian is curious but needs its own pace.
points: Avoid loud noises in the first days

tips.title: Royal Nutrition
tips.description: A majestic cat like the Siberian needs top quality protein. Avoid excessive grains and prefer balanced dry and wet diets.
points: Fresh water always available (ideally a fountain)

tips.title: Social Life
tips.description: The Siberian is often called a cat-dog. It loves company and can suffer from prolonged loneliness. Play with it daily.
